criteria.reason: Authenticated production UI loads workflow agents through the shared API client without duplicated /api prefix.
Blueprint card, run timeline, run history, and approval queue were visible in browser DOM.
Completed run showed full artifact payload and queued-but-not-dispatched boundary.
New run stopped on pending approval and exposed approve/reject controls.
Approval and Completed filters were exercised in browser.
Smoke fixture cleanup completed and DB counters returned zero.
Frontend build, focused backend tests, and backend lint baseline passed.

commands_run: production smoke fixture cleanup and DB zero-count verification
